creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
It has USE_OPENSSL, which does pull in the dependency from
Mk/bsd.openssl.mk:

> (~/freebsd/ports.clean/ftp/curl) $ make -V RUN_DEPENDS
> /usr/local/share/certs/ca-root-nss.crt:/home/bryan/freebsd/ports.clean/security/ca_root_nss /usr/local/lib/libcrypto.so.8:/home/bryan/freebsd/ports.clean/security/openssl


-- 
Regards,
Bryan Drewery
